_readme: Human-verified facts that automated scraping cannot reach (primarily Vaughan, whose site blocks all automated clients). Applied by scraper/main.py AFTER the candidate fetch on every run, so they always win and survive scraper changes. Each override needs provenance: who verified it, when, and against what source.

overrides.verified_by: owner (listed on Vaughan's official Candidates page); news coverage of his campaign launch on nomination-opening day, e.g. westernstandard.news 2026-05-01 'Del Duca enters 2026 Vaughan mayoral race'
owner (listed on Vaughan's official Candidates page; filing date not relayed)
owner (listed on Vaughan's official Candidates page; filing date not relayed)
